notes: Manatee FL Clerk (MCCCC) — custom ASP.NET MVC backend (records.manateeclerk.com). Two-stage HTTP flow: (1) GET search page to extract __RequestVerificationToken from hidden form input, (2) POST to /OfficialRecords/Search/DoSearch with token + search parameters in same cookie jar. Document image download via GET to /DisplayInstrument/InstrumentResultFile/{doc_id}/1/1 (requires same session cookies). No CAPTCHA, no Cloudflare. Reference client implementation: /Users/ag/Desktop/AIProjectsJuly2025/TIUConsulting/US_Counties_Data/FL/AIProjects/Manatee_Title_Abstractor_Tools/query_manatee_clerk.py (stdlib-only urllib + cookiejar). Local cache exists at manatee_cache.db with 2,682,351 records (2007-01-02 to 2025-12-31) for offline searches. NO PRODUCTION ADAPTER YET — search_results.json compatible runs require building a manatee_adapter.py wrapping the two-stage HTTP flow. Test subject: FERNANDEZ PABLO + ROZANES DANIELA (4837 SABAL HARBOUR DR BRADENTON) — verified via local-DB pipeline 2026-05-23 in titlePro/0523/Manatee_FERNANDEZ_fromLocalDb/. DR judgments return doc_id=N/A (FL Ch. 119.0714 + AOSC e-access restriction on Domestic Relations records — courthouse retrieval required).
